tasks.title: Room migration v14→v15: paired_bridge_* tables + DAOs
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/002-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md} AND meshsat/spec/002-unified-directory/design.md for the bridge-side schema. SECOND: implement Room migration v14→v15 in app/src/main/java/com/cubeos/meshsat/data/. Create entities + DAOs for paired_bridge_contacts (composite PK bridge_id+contact_id), paired_bridge_addresses, paired_bridge_groups, paired_bridge_dispatch_policies. Single migration per Article XIII. JVM-test-friendly DAO interfaces per Article VI / REQ-118 / REQ-120.

tasks.title: DirectorySyncService: HTTPS pull + signature verify + MQTT trigger
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/002-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/directory-sync.feature}. SECOND: implement app/src/main/java/com/cubeos/meshsat/service/DirectorySyncService.kt. (REQ-102) HTTP GET /api/directory/snapshot?since=N against each paired bridge using OkHttp + Authorization Bearer. (REQ-103) Ed25519 signature verify with "BC" provider per Article III against the pinned bridge_trust pubkey. (REQ-104) Room transaction apply on success. (REQ-105) WARN log on sig failure. (REQ-106) subscribe to meshsat/bridge/{id}/directory/changed MQTT topic + trigger pull within 5 seconds. (REQ-120) DAO interfaces directly so JVM-testable.

tasks.title: PeopleScreen + ContactDetailScreen + Compose nav + QR export/import + ContactCardImporter
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/002-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/directory-sync.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-108..112) implement PeopleScreen.kt + ContactDetailScreen.kt as Compose Material 3 screens. Search + filter + tap to detail. (REQ-107) stale banner via store.lastSyncAt. (REQ-113) Share via QR action calls POST /api/directory/contacts/{id}/qr/handoff + renders ZXing QR. (REQ-114..116) Scan contact QR opens CameraX + ZXing; on parse calls POST /api/directory/contacts/import-handoff + triggers DirectorySyncService.refresh(). (REQ-117) inline error on failed import. Add ContactCardImporter.kt parallel to existing KeyBundleImporter.kt — REQ-119 keeps the existing importer unchanged.

_audit_note: CGC-verified 2026-05-18: test paths flattened to match repo convention (app/src/test/java/com/cubeos/meshsat/*Test.kt). All future-work paths follow same shape as existing tests (BirthSignerTest, RnsHdlcTest, KeyBundleImporterTest, etc.).
